text: o n % HARTING %MO Issuer's name: Issuer's address: Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (in accordance with ISO/IEC 17050-1) HARTING Electronics GmbH Marienwerderstrage 3 32339 Espelkamp Germany Product Series Product: DIN -Signal & DIN Power Signal Part No: see Attachment A The products named in the attachment are in conformity with the requirements of: DIN EN 45545-2:2020 Railway applications - Fire protection on railway vehicles - Part 2: Requirements for fire behaviour of materials and components The products fulfill the requirement sets R26 for the hazard levels HL1 to HL 3.1 The unclassified flammable mass is below 10g According to clause 4.3.1 of the standards, products with a combustible mass < 10g are not considered, if they are in the delivery state not in touching with other unclassified products. 1The Grouping Rules given in clause 4.3 of DIN EN 45545-2 have been applied. Thus up to 100 g of unclassified material may be used if Rules 1 to 3 are fulfilled and the exposed area of each product is < 0,2 m2. Rule 1: If the total combustible mass of grouped products is < 100 g for interior products or < 400 g for exterior products no requirements apply to the products of this group. Rule 2: If the combustible mass of the grouped products exceeds the limits stated in Rule 1, but is < 500 g for interior grouped products or < 2000 g for exterior grouped products the products of this group have to be tested against R24 until the remaining mass of unclassified products is below the mass as given in Rule 1. Then Rule 1 is applied. R24 requires test of oxygen index according to EN ISO 4589-2. Rule 3: If the combustible mass of the grouped products exceeds the limits stated in Rule 2, products of the group have to fulfill R22 for interior products and R23 for exterior products until the remaining mass of unclassified products is below the limits given in Rule 2. Then Rule 2 is applied.
